step_rationale: Endothelial stress gene induced by oxidative stress and endothelial injury in erosion.
mechanism: OSGIN2 upregulation indicates endothelial dysfunction and oxidative stress in plaque erosion-prone lesions.

references.title: A Nrf2-OSGIN1&2-HSP70 axis mediates cigarette smoke-induced endothelial detachment: implications for plaque erosion.
